# Xi Combinator

> Xi Combinator is a startup accelerator and community backing bold founders with funding, mentorship, and a global network to build category-defining companies.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Xi Combinator programs, cohorts, and community.
- [About](/about): Mission, team, and story behind Xi Combinator.
- [Philosophy](/philosophy): How we pick founders and support companies.
- [Contact](/contact): Offices, email, phone, and FAQ.

## Programs

- [Incubation](/incubation): Early-stage to growth accelerator tracks with funding and mentorship.
- [Xi Lab](/xi-lab): Deep-tech and experimental venture lab.
- [MVP Lab](/mvp-lab): From idea to MVP with product and engineering support.
- [Hackathon](/hackathon): 2026 hackathons, themes, and prizes.

## Ecosystem

- [Startup Directory](/startup-directory): Global directory of portfolio and community startups.
- [Featured Startups](/featured-startups): Curated standout companies.
- [Monthly Top 10](/monthly-top-10): Highest-momentum startups each month.
- [Quarterly Top 5](/quarterly-top-5): Best-performing cohort startups each quarter.
- [Current Cohort](/current-cohort): Companies in the active batch.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Alumni outcomes and case studies.

## Capital & Support

- [Investor Centre](/investor-centre): Market signals, deal flow, and investor programs.
- [Deals](/deals): Partner discounts and credits for founders.
- [Cloud Credits](/cloud-credits): Infrastructure credits from partners.
- [Grants & Funding](/grants-funding): Non-dilutive funding options.

## Partners

- [Partnership](/partnership): Partner ecosystem by category (tech, finance, credits).
- [Partners](/partners): Full partner directory.

## Content

- [Blogs](/blogs): Founder and operator writing.
- [News](/news): Startup, funding, policy, and market news.

## Community

- [Meet a Co-founder](/meet-cofounder): Co-founder matching.
- [Become a Mentor](/become-mentor): Join as an advisor or mentor.
- [Past Events](/past-events): Recap of demo days and community events.

## Optional

- [Subscription](/subscription): Membership and subscription plans.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms-conditions)
